_note: The family being portrayed in the East Maui (Kaupakalua Dam) demo. Identity + home are taken from kaupakalua-location-feed.json's `user` block; the personalization fields (has_car, mobility_needs, pets, language) are demo assumptions for this 'Family of five' household. They are driving in the location feed, so has_car=true. Edit these to drive different reconcile() outputs, then re-run `npm run demo:drive`.
name: Family of five
